name: D8 G2B Processing ISO8583:1993
description: D8 G2B Payment Platform External Interface specification v1.10. D8 21-byte ASCII header. ISO 8583:1993(E) with Fixed TLV in field 48 and BER-TLV in field 55.

messages.name: Authorisation Request
messages.description: Requests approval authorisation for the transaction to continue and complete.

messages.name: Authorisation Response
messages.description: Returned in response to an Authorisation Request (1100) to approve or deny the request.

messages.name: Authorisation Advice
messages.description: Advises of an authorisation carried out on behalf of the card issuer. SAF delivery required.

messages.name: Authorisation Advice Response
messages.description: Acknowledges the receipt of an 1120 message. Rejection not permitted.

messages.name: Financial Transaction Request
messages.description: Requests approval for a card related transaction with all data for authorisation, posting and reconciliation.

messages.name: Financial Transaction Response
messages.description: Responds to a 1200 financial transaction request with the issuer's decision to approve or decline.

messages.name: Financial Transaction Advice
messages.description: Advises of a previously completed financial transaction. Used for force post or store-and-forward.

messages.name: Financial Transaction Advice Response
messages.description: Acknowledges the receipt of a 1220 message.

messages.name: Reversal Request
messages.description: Used by acquirer to inform issuers when a 1100/1200 must be completely or partially cancelled.

messages.name: Reversal Request Response
messages.description: Acknowledges receipt of a 1400 reversal request message.

messages.name: Reversal Advice
messages.description: Informs issuers when a 1100/1200 must be cancelled. Store-and-forward if not sent immediately.

messages.name: Reversal Advice Response
messages.description: Acknowledges receipt of a 1420 reversal advice message.

messages.name: Network Management Request
messages.description: Used for logon, logoff, echo test and key change requests.

messages.name: Network Management Response
messages.description: Responds to an 1804 network management request.

fields.name: Message Type Identifier
fields.description: Four-digit numeric field: Version(1)=1, Class(1)=1-Auth|2-Fin|4-Rev|8-Net, Function(1)=0-Req|1-Resp|2-Adv|3-AdvRsp, Origin(1)=0-Acq|2-Iss|4-Oth

fields.name: Primary Bitmap
fields.description: 64-bit primary bitmap. Bit 1=1 indicates secondary bitmap (field 1 extended) is present. Bits 1-64 indicate presence of fields 1-64 respectively.

fields.name: Primary Account Number (PAN)
fields.description: Series of digits identifying a customer account. Configurable as n..19 or ans..19 (Virtual PAN). LLVAR.

fields.name: Processing Code
fields.description: Describes the effect of a transaction on the customer account. Subfields: [1-2]Transaction, [3-4]From Account, [5-6]To Account.

values.description: Goods and services with cash disbursement

fields.name: Amount, Transaction
fields.description: Value of funds requested by cardholder in local currency of acquirer. 12 digits, no decimal point; decimal place implied by Field 49. For Money Transfer (txn 47): contains Acquirer Fee.

fields.name: Amount, Settlement
fields.description: Transaction Amount (Field 4) converted to settlement currency. Used in 1210/1230 responses (VISA SMS). Decimal place implied by Field 50.

fields.name: Amount, Cardholder Billing
fields.description: Amount billed to cardholder in cardholder account currency exclusive of billing fees. Must be inserted together with Fields 10 and 51.

fields.name: Transmission Date and Time
fields.description: Date and time the message was generated. Expressed in UTC (MMDDhhmmss). Set for each outgoing message.

fields.name: Conversion Rate, Cardholder Billing
fields.description: Factor used in conversion from transaction to cardholder billing amount. Leftmost digit = number of decimal places, remaining 7 digits = rate. Must be inserted together with Fields 6 and 51.

fields.name: Systems Trace Audit Number (STAN)
fields.description: Uniquely identifies a transaction. Incremented by 1 for each new request. Not reset for at least 3 business days. Key field for matching.

fields.name: Date and Time, Local Transaction
fields.description: Year, month, day and local time at which transaction took place at point of card acceptance (YYMMDDhhmmss). Local time, not UTC. Key field for matching.

fields.name: Date, Expiration
fields.description: Year and month at which the PAN will expire (YYMM). May be omitted if data is included in Track 1 or Track 2.

fields.name: Date, Settlement
fields.description: Year, month and day for which this message becomes part of a transaction's settlement (YYMMDD). Primarily VISA SMS 1210/1230, 1410/1430 responses.

fields.name: Date, Conversion
fields.description: Month and day used to convert the transaction from local currency into issuer currency (MMDD). Visa 1210/1230 and Europay.

fields.name: Acquiring Institution Country Code
fields.description: Numeric code of the country where the acquiring institution is located. ISO 3166-1 numeric.

fields.name: Country Code, Primary Account Number
fields.description: Identifies the country of the card issuer institution. Used when Field 2 (PAN) begins with '59' to make account number unique.

fields.name: Country Code, Forwarding Institution
fields.description: Identifies the country of the forwarding institution. Used only if Field 33 begins with '59'. Primarily VISA SMS.

fields.name: Point Of Service Data Code
fields.description: Identifies terminal capability, environment and presentation security data. 12-character ASCII. Subfields: [1]CardDataInputCapability, [2]CardholderAuthCapability, [3]CardCaptureCapability, [4]OperatingEnvironment, [5]CardholderPresent, [6]CardPresent, [7]CardDataInputMethod, [8]CardholderAuthMethod, [9-12]Unused.

fields.name: Card Sequence Number
fields.description: Differentiates cards with the same PAN. Used by EMV transactions when Card Sequence Number is present on ICC. Omitted for card-less transactions.

fields.name: Function Code
fields.description: Indicates specific purpose of the message within its message class. 100=Original authorisation, 200=Original financial, 400=Full reversal, 401=Partial reversal, 801=Logon, 802=Logoff, 811=Key change, 831=Echo test.

fields.name: Message Reason Code
fields.description: Provides receiver of request/advice with the reason or purpose. Required in all reversal messages. Values: 4000=Customer cancellation, 4001=Unspecified, 4002=Suspected malfunction, 4003=Format error, 4004=Completed partially, 4005=Original amount incorrect, 4006=Response too late, 4007=Device unable to complete, 4013=Unable to deliver, 4014=Malfunction/card retained, 4018=Timed out at taking money, 4019=Timed out/card retained, 4021=Time out waiting for response.

fields.name: Card Acceptor Business Type
fields.description: Classification of merchant's type of business product or service (MCC). Must be '6011' for all ATM transactions.

fields.name: Approval Code Length
fields.description: Maximum length of approval code that acquirer can accommodate (1-5). Currently only used in Europay transactions.

fields.name: Date, Reconciliation
fields.description: Year, month and day for which financial totals are reconciled between card issuer and acquirer (YYMMDD). Added by G2B Processing to responses.

fields.name: Amount, Original
fields.description: Amount of the original transaction being fully or partially reversed. Must match value in original 1100/1200 request. Decimal place implied by Field 49.

fields.name: Acquiring Institution Identification Code
fields.description: Code identifying the acquiring institution. LLVAR, up to 11 digits. Used with Field 47 Working Key Sequence Number to identify AWK. Key field for reversal matching.

fields.name: Forwarding Institution Identification Code
fields.description: Code identifying the forwarding institution. LLVAR, up to 11 digits. Primarily used in VISA request transactions.

fields.name: Track 2 Data
fields.description: Track 2 magnetic stripe data as defined in ISO 7813, excluding start/end sentinels and LRC. LLVAR, up to 37 chars. Nibble-packed BCD. Field separator '=' coded as hex D. For ICC transactions, data comes from Track 2 Equivalent Data on chip.

fields.name: Retrieval Reference Number (RRN)
fields.description: 12-character alphanumeric. Key field for reversal matching. Usual format: [1-4]Julian date(yddd), [5-6]Hour, [7-12]STAN. Europay acquirer format: [1-7]MMDD+discretionary, [8-12]Terminal Transaction Number.

fields.name: Approval Code
fields.description: Code assigned by the authorising institution indicating approval. 6-character alphanumeric. Values of all spaces or all zeroes forbidden.

fields.name: Action Code
fields.description: Defines the action taken or to be taken and the reason. See Appendix C of spec. 000=Approved, 085=Not declined, 100=Do not honor, 400=Accepted (reversal completed), 9xx=Format error.

fields.name: Service Code
fields.description: Geographic/service availability identification per ISO 7813. Three-digit service code from magnetic stripe. Optional in VISA 1100/1120/1400; should not be present if Track 1 or Track 2 data is present.

fields.name: Card Acceptor Terminal Identification
fields.description: Unique code identifying a terminal at the card acceptor location. 8-character alphanumeric+special. Used with Field 42 to uniquely identify terminal.

fields.name: Card Acceptor Identification Code
fields.description: Acquirer-assigned code identifying card acceptor (merchant). 15-character alphanumeric+special. ATM: bank name operating the ATM. Point of Sale: conditional for authorisations, mandatory otherwise.

fields.name: Card Acceptor Name/Location
fields.description: Name and location of card acceptor (merchant or ATM). LLVAR, up to 99 chars. Format 0 (default): [1-25]Location desc, [26-38]City name, [39-40]Alpha country code. Format 1: Name~Street~City~Postcode+Region+Country (up to 64 chars).

fields.name: Additional Response Data
fields.description: Response data for certain transaction types. LLLVAR, up to 999 chars. Currently used for ministatement transaction (contains ministatement print data).

fields.name: Track 1 Data
fields.description: Track 1 magnetic stripe data as defined in ISO 7813, excluding start/end sentinels and LRC. LLVAR, up to 76 chars. Omitted for card-less transactions.

fields.name: Amount, Fees
fields.description: Fees associated with this transaction. LLLVAR, up to 204 bytes. Contains up to 6 sets of 34-character fee blocks: [1-2]FeeType(00=TxnFee), [3-5]CurrencyCode(ISO 4217), [6]AmountSign(C=credit,D=debit), [7-14]FeeAmount(n8), [15-22]ConversionRate(unused), [23-31]ReconciliationFee(unused), [32-34]ReconciliationCurrency(unused). For Money Transfer (txn 47): contains Acquirer Fee.

fields.name: Additional Data, National
fields.description: National use data. LLLVAR, up to 999 chars. Mandatory in 1804 key change transactions. Key change subfields: [1-16]SingleLengthKey(16 hex digits, spaces if double), [17-20]CheckDigits, [21]CheckType(1=AWK,2=IWK), [22-23]KeySequence(01-03), [24-55]DoubleLengthKey(32 hex digits, absent if single). TPK key change: this field must NOT be present.

fields.name: Additional Data, Private
fields.description: Private use data. LLLVAR, up to 999 bytes. Uses Fixed TLV Format 2: 2-byte tag, 1-byte length, variable data. Contains subfields for card validation (0087,0092), SET (C001-C004), EMV additional (C005-C011), institution codes (C00A,C00F), amounts (C00B-C00E), POS data (C010,C011), transaction identifiers (C017,C018), Money Transfer (C019-C066), VISA additional (C101-C10A), Europay additional (C201-C203), AMEX (C204), Merchant (C205), V.me (C207), Mastercard (C209), Installments (0098,0099), Promotions (0150), Pre-authorization (0111,0112), and Trace (0208).

fields.name: Currency Code, Transaction
fields.description: ISO 4217 numeric currency code for the transaction (e.g. 840=USD, 978=EUR, 826=GBP). Determines decimal place for monetary amounts.

fields.name: Currency Code, Reconciliation
fields.description: ISO 4217 numeric currency code for reconciliation.

fields.name: Currency Code, Cardholder Billing
fields.description: ISO 4217 numeric currency code of the cardholder account. Must be inserted together with Fields 6 and 10.

fields.name: Personal Identification Number (PIN) Data
fields.description: PIN block data. 8 bytes, BCH encoded (Binary Coded Hexadecimal, like BCD but A-F also permitted). Omitted for card-less transactions.

fields.name: Security Related Control Information
fields.description: Security control data. LLVAR, up to 48 digits numeric.

fields.name: Additional Amounts
fields.description: Additional amount data. LLLVAR, up to 120 chars.

fields.name: Integrated Circuit Card (ICC) System Related Data
fields.description: EMV chip data. LLLVAR, up to 999 bytes. Uses BER-TLV encoding (variable-length tag + variable-length length + data). Contains EMV tags: 5F2A(Currency), 71/72(IssuerScripts), 82(AIP), 84(DFName), 91(IssuerAuthData), 95(TVR), 9A(TxnDate), 9C(TxnType), 9F02(AuthAmount), 9F03(OtherAmount), 9F09(AppVersion), 9F10(IssuerAppData), 9F1A(TermCountryCode), 9F1E(IFDSerialNo), 9F26(AppCryptogram), 9F27(CryptogramInfo), 9F33(TermCapability), 9F34(CVMResults), 9F35(TermType), 9F36(ATC), 9F37(UnpredNumber), 9F41(TxnSeqCounter), 9F53(TxnCategoryCode), 9F6E(FormFactor). Omitted for card-less transactions.

fields.name: Original Data Elements
fields.description: Original data for reversal matching. LLVAR, up to 35 digits. Contains original values of key fields (11 STAN, 12 LocalDateTime, 32 AcqInstCode, 37 RRN) when they differ from the reversal message values.

fields.name: Receiving Institution Identification Code
fields.description: Code identifying the receiving institution. LLVAR, up to 11 digits.

fields.name: Account Identification 1
fields.description: First account identifier. LLVAR, up to 28 chars. Used for source account in transfers and other multi-account transactions.

fields.name: Account Identification 2
fields.description: Second account identifier. LLVAR, up to 28 chars. Used for destination account in transfers and other multi-account transactions.

fields.name: New PIN Data
fields.description: New PIN block for PIN change transactions. 8 bytes, BCH encoded.
